title: Civilizational Ledger: From Cape Wipeout to Tisetan to Umada
framing_note: This ledger gives the UMADA repository a long arc. It is not all locked canon. It tells the steward how to organize future materials and where the world is heading.

eras.title: Ancient Memory
eras.summary: Ancient civilizations, myth, damaged archives, oral memory, sacred geometry.

eras.title: The Hidden Archive
eras.summary: Alien presence as fragmented evidence and suppressed record.

eras.title: The Garden
eras.summary: Coexistence and care before catastrophe; Tallai explores.

eras.title: Cape Wipeout
eras.summary: March 19, 2226 near Cape Agulhas; MIC destroys facility.

eras.title: Super Hurricane Cindy
eras.summary: Cindy carries breach through water, air, and storm.

eras.title: Angel Dust
eras.summary: Chimeran Flu evolves into prolonged instability.

eras.title: Emergency Cybernetics
eras.summary: Repair, survival, and accessibility before status.

eras.title: The Relays
eras.summary: Hand Relay and community signals expand.

eras.title: The Tower
eras.summary: Black Stars Tower hears first. The Black Stars are the premier scientific civilization of the future (Kemi, 2026-06-25).

eras.title: Tisetan Rising
eras.summary: Tisetan rises over the wound as signal/access/archive city.

eras.title: The Kingdom Age
eras.summary: Lion Kingdom, Jackal Peoples, Black Stars, Phoenix Rising, Cybernetic Houses, Pure Human Communities.

eras.title: Umada
eras.summary: Place and idea: care, memory, access, witness, repair.
